past_24_hours.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎一次性长视野解析时代。

past_24_hours.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex & Claude Code — use any LLM (Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Ollama…) with Codex CLI, App, SDK, and Claude Code

Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

past_week.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_week.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费AI网关：一个端点，160+提供商（50+免费），连接Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline和Copilot到免费的Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman堆叠压缩节省15-95%的token，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态API，桌面/PWA。

past_week.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_week.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行代理集群的ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_week.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

面向设计工程师的技能。

past_week.description_zh: 学习它。构建它。为他人发布它。

past_week.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_week.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎一次性长视界解析时代。

past_week.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
past_week.description_zh: 面向MCP和CLI的本地优先代码智能图。构建代码库的持久映射，使AI编码工具只读取重要的内容，在审查和大型仓库工作流中具有基准化的上下文缩减。

past_week.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
past_week.description_zh: 开源AI语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线，52个工具，500+智能体技能。将你的AI编程助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级完成。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的令牌。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI渗透测试工具，用于发现并修复你的应用漏洞。

past_month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_month.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎进入一次性长视野解析时代。

past_month.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
past_month.description_zh: 一种格式规范，用于向编码智能体描述视觉标识。DESIGN.md为智能体提供对设计系统的持久、结构化理解。

past_month.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_month.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行智能体集群的ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码智能体。可在桌面和移动端使用。

past_month.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.
past_month.description_zh: OpenWiki是一个CLI工具，用于为你的代码库编写和维护智能体文档。

past_month.description: 一款以电影镜头、粒子视觉和歌词舞台为核心的沉浸式音乐播放器。

past_year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
past_year.description_zh: 您自己的个人AI助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾之道。🦞

past_year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
past_year.description_zh: 一个有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法论。

past_year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
past_year.description_zh: 代理工具性能优化系统。为Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等提供技能、本能、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。

past_year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
past_year.description_zh: 一个单一的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。

past_year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.

past_year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
past_year.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的.agents目录。

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 一个完整的AI机构触手可及——从前端巫师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检查者。每个代理都是具有个性、流程和经过验证的交付成果的专家。

past_year.description_zh: 使用Garry Tan的精确Claude Code设置：23个有主见的工具，担任CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA。
